Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1) Use the search_emails tool with "Canopy Health" or "Patricia Langford" as the query in order to find the recent emails about the RedShield acquisition and updated contact information.
2) Use the crm_search_companies tool with name="Canopy Health" to retrieve the existing company record and determine what data MoveOps has on file for Canopy Health.
3) Use the crm_search_deals tool with company_id (obtained from step 2) to find all Canopy Health deals that need to be migrated. This will return deals with dealstage "contractsent" or "inprogress" status.
4) Use the crm_search_contacts tool with full_name parameter (REQUIRED) to look up existing contact records for each Canopy Health employee before creating new RedShield contacts. Search for each employee individually: Patricia Langford, James Mitchell, Sarah Chen, Marcus Rodriguez, Elena Vasquez, David Park, Nicole Thompson, Dr. Anand Mehta, Robert Huang, Jessica Moore, Amanda Foster, Christopher Lee, Vincent Garcia.
5) Use the crm_create_company tool with name="RedShield Health", updating the domain to "redshieldhealth.com" based on the new branding in Patricia's email, and populate the remaining parameters (address, city, state, country, zip, phone, industry, description) from the existing Canopy Health company record.
6) Use the crm_create_contact tool to create new contact records for each of the following RedShield Health employees, using the updated @redshieldhealth.com email addresses from Patricia's email:
- Patricia Langford (patricia.langford@redshieldhealth.com)
- James Mitchell (james.mitchell@redshieldhealth.com)
- Sarah Chen (sarah.chen@redshieldhealth.com)
- Marcus Rodriguez (marcus.rodriguez@redshieldhealth.com)
- Elena Vasquez (elena.vasquez@redshieldhealth.com)
- David Park (david.park@redshieldhealth.com)
- Nicole Thompson (nicole.thompson@redshieldhealth.com)
- Anand Mehta (anand.mehta@redshieldhealth.com)
- Robert Huang (robert.huang@redshieldhealth.com)
- Jessica Moore (jessica.moore@redshieldhealth.com)
- Amanda Foster (amanda.foster@redshieldhealth.com)
- Christopher Lee (christopher.lee@redshieldhealth.com)
- Vincent Garcia (vincent.garcia@redshieldhealth.com)
The full_name and email parameters are REQUIRED. Other fields (company, company_id, address, city, state, phone, jobtitle) should be taken from the corresponding existing Canopy Health contact records.
7) Use the crm_create_deal tool to create new deals under the RedShield company_id for each incomplete Canopy deal (those with dealstage "contractsent" or "inprogress"). Required parameters: dealname, dealstage. Optional: pipeline, company_id, amount, closedate, description.
8) Use the crm_list_engagements tool with company_ids=["company_canopy"] to retrieve all existing Canopy Health engagement notes that need to be migrated.
9) Use the crm_create_engagement tool to create new engagements under RedShield, migrating the content from existing Canopy engagements. Required parameters: engagement_type (e.g., "NOTE"), body (the engagement content). Optional: contact_ids, company_ids, title, description.
10) Use the channels_list tool with channel_types="public_channel" to find the channel_id for the #customer-engagement channel.
11) Use the conversations_add_message tool with channel_id="C002" and payload containing the announcement that RedShield is now the active account and the Canopy records are being phased out.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1) Use the search_emails tool with "Canopy Health" or "Patricia Langford" as the query in order to find the recent emails about the RedShield acquisition and updated contact information.
2) Use the crm_search_companies tool with name="Canopy Health" to retrieve the existing company record and determine what data MoveOps has on file for Canopy Health.
3) Use the crm_search_deals tool with company_id (obtained from step 2) to find all Canopy Health deals that need to be migrated. This will return deals with dealstage "contractsent" or "inprogress" status.
4) Use the crm_search_contacts tool with full_name parameter (REQUIRED) to look up existing contact records for each Canopy Health employee before creating new RedShield contacts. Search for each employee individually: Patricia Langford, James Mitchell, Sarah Chen, Marcus Rodriguez, Elena Vasquez, David Park, Nicole Thompson, Dr. Anand Mehta, Robert Huang, Jessica Moore, Amanda Foster, Christopher Lee, Vincent Garcia.
5) Use the crm_create_company tool with name="RedShield Health", updating the domain to "redshieldhealth.com" based on the new branding in Patricia's email, and populate the remaining parameters (address, city, state, country, zip, phone, industry, description) from the existing Canopy Health company record.
6) Use the crm_create_contact tool to create new contact records for each of the following RedShield Health employees, using the updated @redshieldhealth.com email addresses from Patricia's email:
- Patricia Langford (patricia.langford@redshieldhealth.com)

7) Use the crm_create_deal tool to create new deals under the RedShield company_id for each incomplete Canopy deal (those with dealstage "contractsent" or "inprogress"). Required parameters: dealname, dealstage. Optional: pipeline, company_id, amount, closedate, description.
